summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework orchestrated by AI agents, focusing on schema validation, test running, and MCP integration.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated/orchestrated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents) polluting the repository
Staged but uncommitted changes indicating potential workflow interruption
Heavy reliance on automated agent sessions might obscure manual code ownership
suggestions: Clean up or archive the numerous GOrchestra agent directories to reduce repository noise
Commit or revert the currently staged file to maintain a clean git state
Establish a clear policy for merging automated agent test outputs into the main codebase
